cnbc.title: Iran war threatens jet fuel shortage that could disrupt summer travel in Asia and Europe
cnbc.summary: Oil executives have warned that the supply disruption in the Middle East will soon cause actual fuel shortages in some parts of the world.

cnbc.title: Snap issues cautious guidance as Perplexity deal ends, Middle East 'geopolitical situation' causes uncertainty
cnbc.summary: Snap reported first-quarter earnings and provided cautious sales guidance while revealing it no longer has a deal with the generative AI startup Perplexity.

cnbc.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
cnbc.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.

cnbc.title: Nvidia to invest up to $3.2 billion in Corning as part of massive optical fiber deal with 3 new factories focused on AI
cnbc.summary: Corning is opening three new advanced manufacturing plants in the U.S. dedicated entirely to optical technologies for Nvidia.

cnbc.title: Anthropic CEO says 80-fold growth in first quarter explains 'difficulties with compute'
cnbc.summary: At Anthropic's developer conference in San Francisco, CEO Dario Amodei said the company is 'working as quickly as possible' to provide additional compute.

cnbc.title: DoorDash pops 12% on strong earnings, upbeat order growth guidance
cnbc.summary: DoorDash is in the middle of a massive spending initiative as it builds out a new tech platform following a string of acquisitions.

cnbc.title: Warner Bros. Discovery books $2.9 billion net loss tied to Paramount deal, restructuring costs
cnbc.summary: Paramount agreed to pay a Netflix termination fee, but the cost lives on WBD's books until the close of the deal.

cnbc.title: AMD's Su explains what's behind massive forecast change as stock roars 19% on earnings
cnbc.summary: CEO Lisa Su highlighted the growing demand for central processing units, doubling her long-term forecast after strong first-quarter earnings.

cnbc.title: Berkshire-owned distribution giant to deploy driverless big rigs across U.S. Sun Belt
cnbc.summary: Berkshire Hathaway-owned McLane, one of America's biggest distribution companies, is deploying self-driving big rigs with Aurora for its restaurants business.

cnbc.title: Will Elon Musk win his lawsuit against Sam Altman's OpenAI? Here's what prediction markets think
cnbc.summary: Trading activity on Elon Musk's suit against OpenAI is the second highest out of all prediction market contracts related to the billionaire.
